title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can sign in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies that unauthenticated access to protected pages is gated by redirecting to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Verify the user is on the login page
Navigate to /roster
Verify the user is on the login page

title: Deep link to protected page returns user to intended page after login
description: Verifies that a logged-out user who deep-links to a protected page is redirected to login and then returned to the originally requested page after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the events page with events content displayed

title: Sign up creates an account and redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies that a new user can create an account with valid email/password and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a new valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the signup form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: View events list while authenticated
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can access the events page and see scheduled events content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to events
Verify events content is displayed

title: Open event details and RSVP updates within details
description: Verifies that a user can open an event’s details and set an RSVP that is reflected in the event details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to events
Open an event from the events list
Select an RSVP response
Verify the RSVP status is reflected in the event details

title: Authenticated session persists across refresh on dashboard
description: Verifies that an authenticated user remains signed in after refreshing a protected page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Press Reload
Verify the user remains on the dashboard and protected content is displayed

title: RSVP persists after refresh and is reflected in list/details
description: Verifies that updating an RSVP persists after refreshing the events page and remains reflected when reopening event details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to events
Open an event from the events list
Select an RSVP response different from the current state
Press Reload
Open the same event from the events list
Verify the RSVP status remains set in the event details

title: Staff can create a new event and see it in the schedule
description: Verifies that a staff user can create an event, save it, and see the new event appear in the events list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to events
Start creating a new event
Fill a title into the event title field
Select a valid date for the event
Select a valid start time for the event
Save the event
Verify the new event appears in the events list

title: Add a roster member with required details
description: Verifies that a staff user can add a new member with required fields and the new member appears in the roster list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the roster area
Start adding a new roster member
Fill "Test Member A" into the member name field
Fill valid values into any other required member fields
Save the new member
Verify the new member appears in the roster list

title: Toggle between calendar and list views on events
description: Verifies that a user can switch the events page between calendar and list views and still see events content in the selected view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to events
Toggle the events view mode
Verify events content is displayed in the chosen view

title: View roster list and open a member profile
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view the roster list and open a member profile showing member status/details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the roster area
Select a member from the roster list
Verify the member profile view is displayed

title: Search for a member and edit member details
description: Verifies that a staff user can search/select a member, edit their details, save, and see the updated information reflected in the member profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the roster area
Start adding a new roster member
Fill "Test Member Edit" into the member name field
Fill valid values into any other required member fields
Save the new member
Use the roster search to find "Test Member Edit"
Select the searched member from results
Enter edit mode for the member
Fill "Test Member Edit Updated" into the member name field
Save the member changes
Verify the member profile shows the updated member information

title: Remove a roster member and show removed status
description: Verifies that a staff user can remove a member and the UI shows the member as removed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the roster area
Start adding a new roster member
Fill "Test Member Remove" into the member name field
Fill valid values into any other required member fields
Save the new member
Select "Test Member Remove" from the roster list
Remove the selected member
Verify the member is marked as removed in the member profile or roster list

title: View league standings and open match details
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view league standings and open a match to see its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to leagues
Open a match from the schedule
Verify match details are displayed

title: Browse match schedule and inspect an upcoming match
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can browse the match schedule and open an upcoming match to inspect opponent and time details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to leagues
Scroll through the match schedule
Open an upcoming match from the schedule
Verify opponent and scheduled time information are displayed for the match

title: Sign up rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email on signup prevents account creation and shows an email validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the signup form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Validate required member name when adding a member
description: Verifies that saving a new member without a required name is blocked and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the roster area
Start adding a new roster member
Leave the member name field empty
Attempt to save the new member
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Handle no roster members empty state
description: Verifies that when the roster has no members, the roster page shows an empty state rather than a broken list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the roster area
Remove visible members one by one until no members remain
Verify an empty state is displayed for the roster list
